inputs.label: Previous Meter Reading (m³)
inputs.businessContext: The meter reading at the start of the billing period, in cubic meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The meter reading at the start of the billing period, in cubic meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fatura dönemi başlangıcındaki sayaç okuması, metreküp cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Zählerstand zu Beginn des Abrechnungszeitraums in Kubikmetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Relevé du compteur au début de la période de facturation, en mètres cubes.
businessContext_i18n.es: La lectura del medidor al inicio del período de facturación, en metros cúbicos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قراءة العداد في بداية فترة الفوترة، بالمتر المكعب.

inputs.label: Current Meter Reading (m³)
inputs.businessContext: The meter reading at the end of the billing period, in cubic meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The meter reading at the end of the billing period, in cubic meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fatura dönemi sonundaki sayaç okuması, metreküp cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Zählerstand am Ende des Abrechnungszeitraums in Kubikmetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Relevé du compteur à la fin de la période de facturation, en mètres cubes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Lectura del contador al final del período de facturación, en metros cúbicos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قراءة العداد في نهاية فترة الفوترة، بالمتر المكعب.

inputs.label: Fixed Charge
inputs.businessContext: Monthly fixed service charge regardless of consumption.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly fixed service charge regardless of consumption.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüketimden bağımsız aylık sabit hizmet ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de service fixes mensuels, indépendants de la consommation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cargo fijo mensual independientemente del consumo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رسوم الخدمة الشهرية الثابتة بغض النظر عن الاستهلاك.

inputs.label: Rate per Cubic Meter
inputs.businessContext: Variable charge per cubic meter of water consumed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variable charge per cubic meter of water consumed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüketilen her metreküp su için değişken ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Variable Gebühr pro Kubikmeter verbrauchten Wassers.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais variables par mètre cube d'eau consommé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cargo variable por metro cúbico de agua consumida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرسوم المتغيرة لكل متر مكعب من المياه المستهلكة.

inputs.label: Tax Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Tax percentage applied to the subtotal (usage + fixed charge).

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax percentage applied to the subtotal (usage + fixed charge).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ara toplama (kullanım + sabit ücret) uygulanan vergi yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Steuerprozentsatz, der auf den Zwischensumme (Verbrauch + Grundgebühr) angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de taxe appliqué au sous-total (utilisation + frais fixes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de impuesto aplicado al subtotal (consumo + cargo fijo).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الضريبة المطبقة على المجموع الفرعي (الاستهلاك + الرسوم الثابتة).
